creator: hoek@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is a known bug and can't be fixed for 2.2.7-RELEASE since a -RELEASE 
is, well, -RELEASEd.... 

The problem results (if memory serves correctly) from ncftp2 having grabbed 
a header from the ncurses port when the package was being built.  There 
doesn't appear to be any work-around (I just tried forcing it to use 
the libncurses.so from the ncurses port, but that core dumps).  You need 
to either build ncftp2 from the source, using the port, or you need to 
grab a newer ncftp2 package (I'm not sure if we have a newer one available 
yet, but as you noticed, an older one works, too :). 

The bug has been fixed in newer versions of the ncurses port by setting 
MANUAL_PACKAGE_BUILD.
